Bash("/c/Program Files/R/R-4.3.1/bin/Rscript.exe" -e "
library(dplyr); library(readr)
output_base <- ''C:/Users/jar335/Documents/Interfaces/model_data/Tax-Simulator/v1/202509112259''

# Load and calculate ETRs just like in create_report_tables.R
baseline_2026 <- read_csv(file.path(output_base, ''baseline/static/detail/2026.csv'')) %>%
  filter(dep_status == 0) %>% mutate(etr_baseline = liab_iit_net / agi)

surtax_2026 <- read_csv(file.path(output_base, ''agi_surtax/static/detail/2026.csv'')) %>%
  filter(dep_status == 0) %>% mutate(etr_surtax = liab_iit_net / agi)

# Calculate bracket ETRs  
baseline_bracket_etrs <- baseline_2026 %>%
  mutate(
    filing_status_group = case_when(
      filing_status == 2 ~ ''Married Filing Jointly'',
      filing_status %in% c(1, 3, 4) ~ ''Unmarried/Other''
    ),
    bracket_1 = case_when(
      filing_status_group == ''Unmarried/Other'' & agi >= 1000000 ~ TRUE,
      filing_status_group == ''Married Filing Jointly'' & agi >= 1500000 ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    ),
    bracket_2 = case_when(
      filing_status_group == ''Unmarried/Other'' & agi >= 2000000 ~ TRUE,
      filing_status_group == ''Married Filing Jointly'' & agi >= 3000000 ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    ),
    bracket_3 = case_when(
      filing_status_group == ''Unmarried/Other'' & agi >= 5000000 ~ TRUE,
      filing_status_group == ''Married Filing Jointly'' & agi >= 7500000 ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(agi > 0) %>%
  group_by(filing_status_group) %>%
  summarise(
    bracket_1_baseline_etr = weighted.mean(etr_baseline[bracket_1], weight[bracket_1], na.rm = TRUE),
    bracket_2_baseline_etr = weighted.mean(etr_baseline[bracket_2], weight[bracket_2], na.rm = TRUE),
    bracket_3_baseline_etr = weighted.mean(etr_baseline[bracket_3], weight[bracket_3], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = ''drop''
  )

surtax_bracket_etrs <- surtax_2026 %>%
  mutate(
    filing_status_group = case_when(
      filing_status == 2 ~ ''Married Filing Jointly'',
      filing_status %in% c(1, 3, 4) ~ ''Unmarried/Other''
    ),
    bracket_1 = case_when(
      filing_status_group == ''Unmarried/Other'' & agi >= 1000000 ~ TRUE,
      filing_status_group == ''Married Filing Jointly'' & agi >= 1500000 ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    ),
    bracket_2 = case_when(
      filing_status_group == ''Unmarried/Other'' & agi >= 2000000 ~ TRUE,
      filing_status_group == ''Married Filing Jointly'' & agi >= 3000000 ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    ),
    bracket_3 = case_when(
      filing_status_group == ''Unmarried/Other'' & agi >= 5000000 ~ TRUE,
      filing_status_group == ''Married Filing Jointly'' & agi >= 7500000 ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(agi > 0) %>%
  group_by(filing_status_group) %>%
  summarise(
    bracket_1_surtax_etr = weighted.mean(etr_surtax[bracket_1], weight[bracket_1], na.rm = TRUE),
    bracket_2_surtax_etr = weighted.mean(etr_surtax[bracket_2], weight[bracket_2], na.rm = TRUE),
    bracket_3_surtax_etr = weighted.mean(etr_surtax[bracket_3], weight[bracket_3], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = ''drop''
  )

bracket_etrs_combined <- baseline_bracket_etrs %>%
  left_join(surtax_bracket_etrs, by = ''filing_status_group'')

print(bracket_etrs_combined)
")

if \(length\(missing\) > 0\) {
  install.packages\(missing, repos='https://cloud.r-project.org'\)
}
"

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add SLURM multi-node parallelization pipeline \(Phase 2\)

Adds an alternative entry point \(slurm_run.sh\) that fans out
run_one_year\(\) calls as SLURM array jobs across cluster nodes,
with a 6-phase dependency chain: setup → baseline → counterfactuals
→ aggregation → post-processing → stacked reports. Includes the
fused static/conventional run_one_year\(\) from Phase 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
